hero.badge: New Feature: Multi-store management is now available
hero.title: A new command center for
hero.description: Unify your sales, inventory, and customer data into one intuitive platform. Make smarter decisions, delight customers, and watch your business grow.

features.title: Everything you need to run your store
features.subtitle: Our comprehensive POS system includes all the features modern retailers need to succeed.

items.title: Barcode Scanning & Checkout
items.description: Lightning-fast barcode scanning with product lookup and instant checkout

items.title: Stock & Inventory Management
items.description: Real-time inventory tracking with low stock alerts and auto-reorder

items.title: Customer & Staff Profiles
items.description: Comprehensive profiles for customers and role-based staff management

items.title: Role-Based Access Control
items.description: Secure access control with customizable permissions for different roles

items.title: Sales Reports
items.description: Detailed analytics and reports to track performance and growth

items.title: Multi-Store Management
items.description: Manage multiple locations from a single dashboard with centralized control

whyChooseUs.title: Why Choose Our POS System?
whyChooseUs.description: We've designed our POS system with modern retailers in mind, focusing on ease of use, reliability, and powerful features that drive business growth.
whyChooseUs.blazingFastDesc: Instant transactions and real-time data sync.
whyChooseUs.bankSecurityDesc: Your data is always safe and encrypted.
whyChooseUs.support247Desc: Our team is always here to help you succeed.

pricing.title: Simple,
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that best fits your business size. All plans include a free 14-day trial.
pricing.freeTrial: Includes a free 14-day trial. No credit card required.
pricing.moneyBack: 30-day money-back guarantee for all paid plans.

plans.name: Basic
plans.description: Perfect for small stores just getting started

testimonials.title: Trusted by Businesses
testimonials.subtitle: Don't just take our word for it. See what our customers have to say about how our POS system has transformed their businesses.

items.name: Rajesh Kumar
items.content: Implementing this POS system has transformed our business operations. The inventory management features alone have saved us countless hours and reduced errors by 35%.

items.name: Priya Sharma
items.content: The customer management features have helped us build stronger relationships with our regulars.

items.name: Vikram Singh
items.content: The analytics dashboard gives us real-time insights that have been crucial for our decision-making.

items.name: Ananya Patel
items.content: The multi-store management capability has been a game-changer for our expanding business.

contact.title: Ready to optimize your store?
contact.subtitle: Join thousands of retailers who trust our POS system to grow their business

form.name: Full Name
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your business needs

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our POS system. Can't find an answer? Chat with our friendly support team.

items.q: Can I use the POS system without internet?
items.a: Yes! Our POS system works fully offline. All data will sync automatically when you're back online.
Absolutely! Fully compliant with tax regulations, automatic tax calculation, and standard invoice formatting.
We offer 24/7 customer support via phone, email, and live chat.
Yes! Multi-store management lets you control everything from one centralized dashboard.

items.q: How secure is my business data?
items.a: We use bank-grade security including end-to-end encryption and secure cloud storage.
Yes, fully customize receipts and invoices with your logo and business information.
Yes, we offer apps for both iOS and Android.

items.q: Is it easy to train new staff?
items.a: Very easy to use. New staff typically learn the basics within 30 minutes.
